about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Passion for wood, precision in execution
about.description: Dargham CNC is a studio specializing in CNC wood designs and carving. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern technology to deliver luxury products that exceed our clients' expectations.
about.missionText: Deliver CNC wood designs with exceptional quality and precision, while meeting deadlines and ensuring client satisfaction.
about.visionText: To be the first choice in CNC woodwork in the region, known for creativity, quality, and professionalism.

values.qualityDesc: We use the finest wood types and advanced CNC equipment
values.precisionDesc: Every detail executed with millimeter-level accuracy
values.creativityDesc: We transform your ideas into unique and distinctive designs

about.highlight1: Specialized expertise in CNC wood carving and design
about.highlight2: Professional team committed to deadlines and quality
about.highlight3: Custom solutions for homes, shops, and offices
